span.p: tied to value floor, antivalue ceiling, metric, claim, milestone, phase, risk, policy, and required standard where applicable

span.p: offer addresses useful but undeclared material

span.p: reviewer or protocol accepts as equivalent, necessary, useful, or complementary

span.p: unrelated, duplicative, or outside control budget

span.p: conflict, capture risk, duplication, weak qualification, or weak method

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: voluntary or already funded work accepted

span.p: control or evidence mission funding covered
